tagline: Base project with Next.js + Tailwind + Urbanist working.
hero_compat: macOS 14.6+ (Sonoma) · MacBook with M1 Pro or newer required
hero_subheadline: A tiny menu bar app that taps into your MacBook's built-in Sudden Motion Sensor and turns every slap into a sound. No setup, no accounts. 100% free.
features_subtitle: Everything Slap Mac does — and nothing it doesn't.
feat_detection_desc: Reads the motion sensor in real time and triggers instantly when you tap the chassis.
feat_audio_desc: Choose from a curated library of slap sounds, drums and effects. New packs added regularly.
feat_sensitivity_desc: Dial in exactly how hard you need to slap. Avoid false triggers from typing or scrolling.
feat_menubar_desc: Always one click away. No dock icon, no clutter, almost zero CPU when idle.
how_subtitle: From zero to slapping in under a minute.
how_step1_desc: Grab the app from this page. 2 MB, no installer needed.
how_step2_desc: Open Slap Mac once and grant motion sensor access in System Settings.
how_step3_desc: Tap the chassis. The app reacts instantly with the sound you picked.
about_subtitle: An indie project built with care for the macOS community. Got feedback or just want to say hi?
